sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77518" key="panospri/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰν-οσπρία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n77518.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mixture of all sorts of pulse</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:248" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.248</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
